model.label: DeepSeek V3.2
model.description: DeepSeek • General-purpose V-series model optimized for reasoning, coding, and efficient inference.

pick.rationale: Texas's high-powered offense, which ranks among the nation's best, should be the difference in a close game against NC State. The Longhorns have the firepower to overcome their defensive deficiencies, while NC State's inconsistent season makes them vulnerable in a one-and-done setting. Expect Texas to make enough key plays down the stretch to secure a narrow victory.

reasoningStep.title: West 11 Play-in Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Texas's offensive efficiency and recent reports point to a narrow win over NC State in the First Four.
evidence: Texas ranks 37th in KenPom and 45th in Torvik, with an elite offense (adjusted offense rank 13th) but a below-average defense (adjusted defense rank 106th).
NC State's current metrics are unknown, but they were preseason 38th in KenPom, indicating a comparable bubble team with potential inconsistencies.
A live blog from The Athletic reported Texas's 68-66 victory over NC State in the First Four, highlighting a close contest that Texas managed to win.
